summary: Comprehensive testing of Plan4Growth Academy completed successfully. All backend APIs (16/16) passing and frontend UI redesign verified with perfect implementation of white/light backgrounds and amber accents. Complete auth flow, dashboard, and all required sections working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API Health Check (16/16 endpoints passing)
Homepage loads with new clean UI design - hero with background image, badges, 3 CTAs
About section with emoji icons (🎯✅🤝📈) displays correctly
Why Implantology Training Matters section with 3 cards working
Programme Highlights section with 6 feature cards working
Faculty section with avatar initials in amber circles working
Upcoming Intakes section with 2 intake cards working
Navigation works: Home, Diploma Programme, Faculty, Admissions, Contact
Contact form submission to /api/contact works with success message
Login page loads with Google OAuth and email form
Register page loads with complete form
Dashboard loads for authenticated user with all sections
Color scheme correctly implemented: white/light backgrounds with amber (#F59E0B) accents
All mocked integrations (Stripe, S3, SendGrid, Twilio) working as expected
